brand_name.label: Brand name override
brand_name.info: Optional. Used for document metadata when a custom brand name is needed.

brand_primary_color.label: Brand primary color
brand_primary_color.info: Sets the shared brand token used by the minimal shell and focus state.

favicon.label: Favicon
favicon.info: Optional. Used as the browser and device icon for the shell.

canvas_color.label: Canvas color
canvas_color.info: Sets the default page background token for the minimal runtime shell.

text_color.label: Text color
text_color.info: Sets the default text token used by the base document styling.

spacing_scale.label: Spacing scale
spacing_scale.info: Controls the shared shell rhythm and page gutter spacing.

radius_scale.label: Radius scale
radius_scale.info: Controls the shared shell corner rounding tokens.

motion_level.label: Motion level
motion_level.info: Sets the default transition intensity for the minimal runtime foundation.

direction_mode.label: Document direction
direction_mode.info: Auto follows the active locale. Use an override only when the shell must stay fixed.

shell_width.label: Shell width
shell_width.info: Controls the neutral page container width used by the global shell only.
